0.title: Safe Reinforcement Learning from B Models
0.content: Learn policies directly from formal specifications using ProB and B invariants. Explore Environments GitHub .

1.title: What is BRein Studio?
1.content: BRein Studio connects Reinforcement Learning algorithms with executable B specifications. Instead of implementing an environment manually, an agent interacts directly with a formally specified system through the ProB animator and model-checker.

2.title: Available Environments
2.content: Taxi Driver . Discrete navigation and pickup/drop-off tasks. Open Taxi Driver → .
